# sha256 of the raw upstream artifacts as pulled from jsdelivr. scripts/vendor-ffmpeg.sh
# verifies these right after download, before compressing the wasm. The deployed
# ffmpeg-core.wasm.gz is derived from the verified ffmpeg-core.wasm below.
a4c09a1997ac582a735fc21e20f9913df4af6dde4ebb373f1d714a4b6e7616f1  vendor/ffmpeg/ffmpeg.js
c4702e2f749671b2f9cf07e4738abaf4511fc0d89525ad6a93bc3c2a8ad0822a  vendor/ffmpeg/814.ffmpeg.js
a34873964b0f62aec516bac75e3aa9086ec3535d4d07f0269aa94ea748b6cb71  vendor/core/ffmpeg-core.js
2390efa7fb66e7e42dbae15427571a5ffc96b829480904c30f471f0a78967f61  vendor/core/ffmpeg-core.wasm
